content: TP-182 remains genuinely blocked in iteration 3. I revalidated the worktree with `ls .`, `find dashboard/**`, `find extensions/**`, and `git ls-tree --name-only HEAD`; the prompt-scoped implementation sources are still absent (`dashboard/*`, `extensions/taskplane/*`). I updated STATUS.md with the new verification log and committed it as `7e10039 chore(TP-182): document persistent blocker`. No safe implementation work is possible without the missing source tree being restaged.
